# `compose_verify_text_visible`

Verify that specific text is visible on screen.
This is a test assertion — it will fail if the text is not found.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.compose.driver.tools.ComposeVerifyTextVisibleTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Required parameters

- `text` — `String`
  The text content to verify is visible.

## Output

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)
